task_summaries.task_scope: Verify stability of class-conditioned distribution shifts in backward packet length features across different time windows and network conditions using evidence refs e10 to e12.
Compare variance ratios and unique value counts of backward packet length features between classes to identify structural differences using evidence refs e10 to e12.
Assess risk of overfitting by detecting dataset-specific artifacts and shortcut-like signals in backward packet length features using evidence refs e10 to e12.
Evaluate potential for reliable class discrimination based on structural variations in backward packet length features under varying conditions using evidence refs e10 to e12.
